text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 26 

CLM_FINL_ACTN_IND 

LABEL: Claim Final Action Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This field is stored in the CMS Integrated Data Repository (IDR) as the final action indicator; however, 
CMS has verified that for 2015 encounter records, this field should not be used to identify the final 
version of the record. Note that the term “final action” is used differently in encounter data,
